This is a Lean 4 / Mathlib formalization project for quantum complexity theory,
centered on MIP* = RE and low-degree tests. Be thorough and precise. Report
findings in clean markdown format.

In any audit, the phrase "fully formalized" has a source-faithful meaning. A
paper-labelled or blueprint-linked item is fully formalized only when the
public Lean statement matches the cited paper or blueprint statement, the
relevant proof has no `sorry`, and the theorem does not depend on a non-paper
bridge, residual, repair, package, producer, proof-obligation input,
hypotheses bundle, assumptions bundle, arbitrary implication hypothesis, or
caller-supplied proposition standing in for a proof step.
